WITH base AS (
 SELECT
 SUBSTR(t.dteventtime, 1, 7) AS mon,
 t.gamepodid,
 SUBSTR(t.dteventtime, 1, 13) AS hr,
 LOWER(t.queueid) AS queueid,
 t.matchid
 FROM dwd_argothek_matchdetails_hi t
 WHERE t.dteventtime >= '2025-04-01 00:00:00'
 AND t.dteventtime <= '2025-06-30 23:59:59'
 AND t.provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking'
 AND LOWER(t.queueid) IN ('swiftplay','competitive','unrated')
 AND LOWER(t.completionstate) IN ('completed','surrendered')
),
pods AS (
 SELECT DISTINCT b.gamepodid
 FROM base b
),
months AS (
 SELECT '2025-04' AS mon
 UNION ALL SELECT '2025-05'
 UNION ALL SELECT '2025-06'
),
grid AS (
 SELECT m.mon, p.gamepodid
 FROM months m
 CROSS JOIN pods p
),
hourly_end AS (
 SELECT
 b.mon,
 b.gamepodid,
 b.hr,
 COUNT(DISTINCT b.matchid) AS total_game_end_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.queueid = 'competitive' THEN b.matchid END) AS competitive_end_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.queueid = 'unrated' THEN b.matchid END) AS unrated_end_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.queueid = 'swiftplay' THEN b.matchid END) AS swiftplay_end_cnt
 FROM base b
 GROUP BY b.mon, b.gamepodid, b.hr
),
peak AS (
 SELECT
 x.mon,
 x.gamepodid,
 x.hr AS peak_time,
 x.total_game_end_cnt,
 x.competitive_end_cnt,
 x.unrated_end_cnt,
 x.swiftplay_end_cnt
 FROM (
 SELECT
 h.*,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
 PARTITION BY h.mon, h.gamepodid
 ORDER BY h.total_game_end_cnt DESC, h.hr ASC
 ) AS rn
 FROM hourly_end h
 ) x
 WHERE x.rn = 1
)
SELECT
 g.mon AS `domain_term_51d806399a`,
 g.gamepodid AS `domain_term_2b32cc53ab`,
 p.peak_time AS `domain_term_551433f0db`,
 COALESCE(p.total_game_end_cnt, 0) AS `domain_term_988f7795d7`,
 COALESCE(p.competitive_end_cnt, 0) AS `domain_term_c1d0a983b0`,
 COALESCE(p.unrated_end_cnt, 0) AS `domain_term_27559c8192`,
 COALESCE(p.swiftplay_end_cnt, 0) AS `domain_term_5bbed3de2f`
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN peak p
 ON p.mon = g.mon
 AND p.gamepodid = g.gamepodid
ORDER BY g.mon, g.gamepodid;

WITH day_dau AS (

 SELECT l.statis_date, l.iuserid
 FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di l
 WHERE l.statis_date BETWEEN 20250426 AND 20250502
 AND l.iloginway = 3
 GROUP BY l.statis_date, l.iuserid
),
week_active_days AS (
 /* domain_term_83c91c514e：domain_term_ebdb67baf6（domain_term_b72ffd143d 20250426-20250502） */
 SELECT l.iuserid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT l.statis_date) AS week_active_days
 FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di l
 WHERE l.statis_date BETWEEN 20250426 AND 20250502
 AND l.iloginway = 3
 GROUP BY l.iuserid
),
map_role AS (
 /* domain_term_9013849179->domain_term_27bf753ac6：domain_term_80b7a42147，domain_term_dfe75701c0 iareaid=101 */
 SELECT DISTINCT d.iuserid, d.vRoleID
 FROM dim_argothek_gplayerid_vroleid_df d
 WHERE d.dtstatdate = '20250502'
 AND d.iAreaID = '101'
),
match_day AS (
 /* domain_term_446acbf4ea：domain_term_009f50bafc dteventtime，domain_term_38ee75697e */
 SELECT
 REPLACE(SUBSTR(m.dteventtime, 1, 10), '-', '') AS statis_date,
 m.vroleid,
 m.queueid
 FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchstats_hi m
 WHERE m.dteventtime IS NOT NULL
 AND SUBSTR(m.dteventtime, 1, 10) BETWEEN '2025-04-26' AND '2025-05-02'
 AND m.ismatchcompleted = 1
 AND m.completionstate != 'Surrendered'
),
user_queue_by_day AS (
 /* domain_term_686b703f41“domain_term_08d65bdbc3DAUdomain_term_0ad5a80fc7”domain_term_55f45903e8，domain_term_6884b8128d */
 SELECT
 d.statis_date,
 d.iuserid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT md.queueid) AS distinct_queue_cnt,
 MAX(md.queueid) AS max_queueid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN md.queueid IN ('QuickMatch','RushMode','CombatArena') THEN md.queueid END) AS leisure_queue_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN md.queueid NOT IN ('QuickMatch','RushMode','CombatArena') THEN md.queueid END) AS other_queue_cnt
 FROM day_dau d
 LEFT JOIN map_role r
 ON d.iuserid = r.iuserid
 LEFT JOIN match_day md
 ON md.statis_date = CAST(d.statis_date AS STRING)
 AND md.vroleid = r.vRoleID
 GROUP BY d.statis_date, d.iuserid
),
mode_a_only AS (
 SELECT
 u.statis_date,
 u.iuserid
 FROM user_queue_by_day u
 WHERE u.distinct_queue_cnt = 1
 AND u.max_queueid = 'QuickMatch'
),
mode_b_only AS (
 SELECT
 u.statis_date,
 u.iuserid
 FROM user_queue_by_day u
 WHERE u.distinct_queue_cnt = 1
 AND u.max_queueid = 'RushMode'
),
mode_c_only AS (
 SELECT
 u.statis_date,
 u.iuserid
 FROM user_queue_by_day u
 WHERE u.distinct_queue_cnt = 1
 AND u.max_queueid = 'CombatArena'
),
only_leisure AS (
 SELECT
 u.statis_date,
 u.iuserid
 FROM user_queue_by_day u
 WHERE u.other_queue_cnt = 0
 AND u.leisure_queue_cnt > 0
),
all_days AS (
 SELECT DISTINCT statis_date FROM day_dau
),
result_a AS (
 SELECT
 d.statis_date,
 COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuserid) AS cnt
 FROM all_days d
 LEFT JOIN mode_a_only a
 ON a.statis_date = d.statis_date
 GROUP BY d.statis_date
),
result_b AS (
 SELECT
 d.statis_date,
 COUNT(DISTINCT b.iuserid) AS cnt
 FROM all_days d
 LEFT JOIN mode_b_only b
 ON b.statis_date = d.statis_date
 GROUP BY d.statis_date
),
result_c AS (
 SELECT
 d.statis_date,
 COUNT(DISTINCT c.iuserid) AS cnt
 FROM all_days d
 LEFT JOIN mode_c_only c
 ON c.statis_date = d.statis_date
 GROUP BY d.statis_date
),
result_only_leisure AS (
 SELECT
 d.statis_date,
 COUNT(DISTINCT o.iuserid) AS cnt
 FROM all_days d
 LEFT JOIN only_leisure o
 ON o.statis_date = d.statis_date
 GROUP BY d.statis_date
),
avg_week_active AS (
 SELECT
 AVG(w.week_active_days) AS avg_week_active_days
 FROM week_active_days w
 JOIN (
 SELECT DISTINCT iuserid FROM only_leisure
 ) u
 ON u.iuserid = w.iuserid
)
SELECT
 ra.statis_date AS `domain_term_b6fed9af83`,
 ra.cnt AS `domain_term_e14c596f5dQuickMatchdomain_term_ca62426403`,
 rb.cnt AS `domain_term_e14c596f5dRushModedomain_term_ca62426403`,
 rc.cnt AS `domain_term_e14c596f5dCombatArenadomain_term_ca62426403`,
 rol.cnt AS `domain_term_00b7a1684b`,
 awa.avg_week_active_days AS `domain_term_6ea7b0c710`
FROM result_a ra
JOIN result_b rb ON rb.statis_date = ra.statis_date
JOIN result_c rc ON rc.statis_date = ra.statis_date
JOIN result_only_leisure rol ON rol.statis_date = ra.statis_date
CROSS JOIN avg_week_active awa
ORDER BY ra.statis_date;

WITH months AS (

 UNION ALL SELECT '202402' AS month
 UNION ALL SELECT '202403' AS month
 UNION ALL SELECT '202404' AS month
),
netbar_users AS (
 /* domain_term_3c41547a62：domain_term_a7d5294c8e */
 SELECT
 SUBSTR(pl.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 6) AS month,
 pl.iuserid
 FROM dwd_argothek_playerlogout_hi pl
 WHERE pl.tdbank_imp_date BETWEEN '2024010100' AND '2024043023'
 AND pl.inetbarlevel = '2'
 GROUP BY SUBSTR(pl.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 6), pl.iuserid
),
user_time AS (
 /* domain_term_0a1de8227d，domain_term_dd0a999d21，domain_term_4460129b09 */
 SELECT
 SUBSTR(pl.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 6) AS month,
 pl.iuserid,
 SUM(CASE WHEN pl.inetbarlevel = '2' THEN pl.ionlinetime ELSE 0 END) AS netbar_time,
 SUM(pl.ionlinetime) AS total_time,
 COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(pl.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8)) AS active_days,
 MAX(CASE WHEN pl.icampuslevel > '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_campus
 FROM dwd_argothek_playerlogout_hi pl
 JOIN netbar_users nu
 ON nu.month = SUBSTR(pl.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 6)
 AND nu.iuserid = pl.iuserid
 WHERE pl.tdbank_imp_date BETWEEN '2024010100' AND '2024043023'
 GROUP BY SUBSTR(pl.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 6), pl.iuserid
),
month_agg AS (
 SELECT
 ut.month,
 COUNT(DISTINCT ut.iuserid) AS netbar_users_cnt,
 SUM(ut.netbar_time) AS sum_netbar_time,
 SUM(ut.total_time) AS sum_total_time,
 SUM(ut.active_days) AS sum_active_days,
 SUM(CASE WHEN ut.has_campus = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS campus_users_cnt
 FROM user_time ut
 GROUP BY ut.month
)
SELECT
 m.month AS `domain_term_51d806399a（domain_term_7bae1e0954：202401、202402、202403、202404）`,
 CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS `domain_term_6f34fb6796（domain_term_99f6904ff3）`,
 CASE
 WHEN COALESCE(a.sum_total_time, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
 ELSE a.sum_netbar_time / a.sum_total_time
 END AS `domain_term_eb85a431ca`,
 CASE
 WHEN COALESCE(a.netbar_users_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
 ELSE a.campus_users_cnt / a.netbar_users_cnt
 END AS `domain_term_e761e6bef9`,
 CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS `domain_term_7169d57f96（domain_term_99f6904ff3）`,
 CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS `domain_term_0b95be7cfa`,
 CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS `domain_term_7f471c720b`,
 CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS `domain_term_d9b59879f3ARPA`,
 CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS `domain_term_d9b59879f3ARPPA`,
 CASE
 WHEN COALESCE(a.netbar_users_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
 ELSE a.sum_active_days / a.netbar_users_cnt
 END AS `domain_term_269d5042d8`
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN month_agg a
 ON a.month = m.month
ORDER BY m.month;

WITH
params AS (
 SELECT '20240618' AS start_dt, '20250330' AS end_dt
),
rr_base AS (
 SELECT
 r.dtstatdate,
 r.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND r.submodename LIKE 'CG%' AND r.mapname = 'domain_term_3d39b3c319' THEN 'domain_term_124eca6c09'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND r.mapname = 'domain_term_3d39b3c319' THEN 'domain_term_9424c3ec03'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND r.mapname = 'domain_term_7fd6c807a2' THEN 'domain_term_7fd6c807a2'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND r.mapname = 'domain_term_d52ab87191' THEN 'domain_term_d52ab87191'
 WHEN r.submodename = 'domain_term_289f963191' THEN 'domain_term_4b98916e48'
 WHEN r.submodename = 'domain_term_e11fdd8c9f' THEN 'domain_term_93da0581e7'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' THEN 'domain_term_170f5d71af'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_68f20c1125' THEN 'domain_term_b750b1321f'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_372cbd9462' THEN 'domain_term_372cbd9462'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_aa6a118e23' THEN 'domain_term_aa6a118e23'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_4e5ccfc9be' THEN 'domain_term_4e5ccfc9be'
 WHEN r.modename = 'domain_term_41ca2be751' THEN 'domain_term_96bfff66c5'
 ELSE 'domain_term_9464b2154c'
 END AS play_name,
 r.roundcnt
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di r
 JOIN params p
 ON r.dtstatdate BETWEEN p.start_dt AND p.end_dt
 WHERE r.platid IN (0, 1)
 AND r.roundcnt > 0
),
day_dau AS (
 SELECT
 b.dtstatdate,
 COUNT(DISTINCT b.vplayerid) AS dau
 FROM rr_base b
 GROUP BY b.dtstatdate
),
day_play AS (
 SELECT
 b.dtstatdate,
 b.play_name,
 COUNT(DISTINCT b.vplayerid) AS part_users,
 SUM(b.roundcnt) AS part_rounds
 FROM rr_base b
 GROUP BY b.dtstatdate, b.play_name
),
day_metrics AS (
 SELECT
 p.dtstatdate,
 DATE_FORMAT(
 DATE_SUB(str_to_date(p.dtstatdate, '%Y%m%d'), ((dayofweek(str_to_date(p.dtstatdate, '%Y%m%d')) + 5) % 7)),
 '%Y%m%d'
 ) AS week_start,
 p.play_name,
 p.part_users,
 d.dau,
 CAST(p.part_users AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(d.dau AS DOUBLE), 0) AS part_rate,
 CAST(p.part_rounds AS DOUBLE) AS daily_part_rounds
 FROM day_play p
 JOIN day_dau d
 ON p.dtstatdate = d.dtstatdate
)
SELECT
 m.week_start AS week_monday,
 m.play_name,
 AVG(CAST(m.part_users AS DOUBLE)) AS week_avg_daily_part_users,
 AVG(m.part_rate) AS week_avg_daily_part_rate,
 AVG(m.daily_part_rounds) AS week_avg_daily_part_rounds
FROM day_metrics m
GROUP BY m.week_start, m.play_name
ORDER BY m.week_start, m.play_name;

WITH di_day_user AS (
 SELECT
 t.dtstatdate,
 SUBSTR(t.dtstatdate, 1, 6) AS ym,
 t.vplayerid
 FROM dws_jordass_login_di t
 WHERE t.platid = 255
 AND t.dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240201' AND '20240630'
 GROUP BY t.dtstatdate, SUBSTR(t.dtstatdate, 1, 6), t.vplayerid
),
cur_month_user_days AS (
 SELECT
 d.ym,
 d.vplayerid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT d.dtstatdate) AS active_days
 FROM di_day_user d
 WHERE d.dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240301' AND '20240630'
 GROUP BY d.ym, d.vplayerid
),
prev_month_active AS (
 SELECT
 SUBSTR(d.dtstatdate, 1, 6) AS ym,
 d.vplayerid
 FROM di_day_user d
 WHERE d.dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240201' AND '20240531'
 GROUP BY SUBSTR(d.dtstatdate, 1, 6), d.vplayerid
),
cur_with_prev AS (
 SELECT
 cur.ym,
 cur.vplayerid,
 cur.active_days,
 prev.vplayerid AS prev_vplayerid
 FROM cur_month_user_days cur
 LEFT JOIN prev_month_active prev
 ON prev.vplayerid = cur.vplayerid
 AND prev.ym = CASE
 WHEN cur.ym = '202403' THEN '202402'
 WHEN cur.ym = '202404' THEN '202403'
 WHEN cur.ym = '202405' THEN '202404'
 WHEN cur.ym = '202406' THEN '202405'
 ELSE NULL
 END
)
SELECT
 t.ym AS month,
 CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS new_users,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.prev_vplayerid IS NULL THEN t.vplayerid END) AS return_users,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.prev_vplayerid IS NOT NULL AND t.active_days BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN t.vplayerid END) AS light_retention_users,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.prev_vplayerid IS NOT NULL AND t.active_days BETWEEN 5 AND 15 THEN t.vplayerid END) AS medium_retention_users,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.prev_vplayerid IS NOT NULL AND t.active_days >= 16 THEN t.vplayerid END) AS heavy_retention_users
FROM cur_with_prev t
WHERE t.ym IN ('202403','202404','202405','202406')
GROUP BY t.ym

WITH
calendar AS (
 SELECT date_format(date_add(str_to_date('20241101','%Y%m%d'), n), '%Y%m%d') AS stat_date
 FROM (
 SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4
 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9
 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14

base AS (

 m.imode,

 FROM dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di m

 AND m.imode <> 255
 GROUP BY m.dtstatdate, m.imode, m.vplayerid
),

any_users AS (

),

mode_users AS (

),

exists_day AS (
 SELECT m.dtstatdate
 FROM dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di m
 WHERE m.dtstatdate BETWEEN '20241025' AND '20241207'
 GROUP BY m.dtstatdate
),

daily AS (
 SELECT
 mu.dtstatdate,
 mu.imode,
 mu.part_users,
 au.any_part_users,
 (mu.part_users / NULLIF(au.any_part_users, 0)) AS participation_rate,

 CASE WHEN e1.dtstatdate IS NULL THEN NULL
 ELSE (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b1.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN mu_bp.vplayerid END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT mu_bp.vplayerid), 0))
 END AS retention_1d,

 CASE WHEN e7.dtstatdate IS NULL THEN NULL
 ELSE (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b7.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN mu_bp.vplayerid END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT mu_bp.vplayerid), 0))
 END AS retention_7d
 FROM mode_users mu
 JOIN any_users au
 ON mu.dtstatdate = au.dtstatdate
 JOIN base mu_bp
 ON mu.dtstatdate = mu_bp.dtstatdate
 AND mu.imode = mu_bp.imode
 LEFT JOIN base b1
 ON b1.vplayerid = mu_bp.vplayerid
 AND b1.dtstatdate = date_format(date_add(str_to_date(mu.dtstatdate, '%Y%m%d'), 1), '%Y%m%d')
 LEFT JOIN base b7
 ON b7.vplayerid = mu_bp.vplayerid
 AND b7.dtstatdate = date_format(date_add(str_to_date(mu.dtstatdate, '%Y%m%d'), 7), '%Y%m%d')
 LEFT JOIN exists_day e1
 ON e1.dtstatdate = date_format(date_add(str_to_date(mu.dtstatdate, '%Y%m%d'), 1), '%Y%m%d')
 LEFT JOIN exists_day e7
 ON e7.dtstatdate = date_format(date_add(str_to_date(mu.dtstatdate, '%Y%m%d'), 7), '%Y%m%d')
 GROUP BY
 mu.dtstatdate,
 mu.imode,
 mu.part_users,
 au.any_part_users,
 e1.dtstatdate,
 e7.dtstatdate
),

win7 AS (
 SELECT
 c.stat_date,
 d.imode,
 AVG(d.participation_rate) AS avg_participation_rate_7d,
 AVG(d.retention_1d) AS avg_retention_1d_7d,

 FROM calendar c

 ON d.dtstatdate BETWEEN date_format(date_add(str_to_date(c.stat_date, '%Y%m%d'), -7), '%Y%m%d')

 GROUP BY c.stat_date, d.imode
),

win7_enriched AS (
 SELECT
 w.stat_date,
 w.imode,

 dm.onlinedate,
 CASE

 AND dm.onlinedate <= w.stat_date
 AND timestampdiff(
 DAY,
 str_to_date(dm.onlinedate, '%Y%m%d'),
 str_to_date(w.stat_date, '%Y%m%d')
 ) BETWEEN 0 AND 180
 THEN 1 ELSE 0
 END AS is_online_180d,
 CASE WHEN dm.onlinedate IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS has_dim,
 w.avg_participation_rate_7d,
 w.avg_retention_1d_7d,
 w.avg_retention_7d_7d
 FROM win7 w

),

filtered AS (

),

ranked AS (
 SELECT
 f.stat_date,
 f.imode,

 f.avg_participation_rate_7d,
 f.avg_retention_1d_7d,
 f.avg_retention_7d_7d,
 DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY f.stat_date ORDER BY f.avg_participation_rate_7d DESC) AS avg_participation_rate_rank,
 DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY f.stat_date ORDER BY f.avg_retention_1d_7d DESC) AS avg_retention_1d_rank,
 DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY f.stat_date ORDER BY f.avg_retention_7d_7d DESC) AS avg_retention_7d_rank
 FROM filtered f
)

SELECT
 r.stat_date AS dtstatdate,
 r.mode_display_name AS matchsubmodegroupname,
 r.avg_participation_rate_rank,
 r.avg_retention_1d_rank,
 r.avg_retention_7d_rank,
 (r.avg_participation_rate_rank + r.avg_retention_1d_rank + r.avg_retention_7d_rank) AS total_rank_score,
 DENSE_RANK() OVER (
 PARTITION BY r.stat_date
 ORDER BY (r.avg_participation_rate_rank + r.avg_retention_1d_rank + r.avg_retention_7d_rank) ASC
 ) AS total_rank
FROM ranked r
ORDER BY r.dtstatdate, total_rank, r.imode;

 WHEN p.win_dur_sec >= 36000 THEN 13
 ELSE 99
 END AS bucket_sort
 FROM player_win p

 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND t.mapname='domain_term_3d39b3c319' THEN 'domain_term_9424c3ec03'

 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_8a6c6ccf17' THEN 'domain_term_170f5d71af'
 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_68f20c1125' THEN 'domain_term_b750b1321f'
 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_372cbd9462' THEN 'domain_term_372cbd9462'
 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_aa6a118e23' THEN 'domain_term_aa6a118e23'
 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_4e5ccfc9be' THEN 'domain_term_4e5ccfc9be'
 WHEN t.modename='domain_term_41ca2be751' THEN 'domain_term_96bfff66c5'
 ELSE 'domain_term_9464b2154c'
 END AS play_group,
 CAST(COALESCE(t.roundtime,'0') AS BIGINT) AS roundtime_sec,
 CASE WHEN t.modename='domain_term_372cbd9462' AND t.submodename='domain_term_249cdf8d4d' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_champion
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di t
 WHERE t.dtstatdate BETWEEN '20241001' AND '20250108'
 AND t.platid <> 255
),
week_user_group AS (
 SELECT
 b.week_idx,
 b.vplayerid,
 b.play_group,
 SUM(b.roundtime_sec) AS group_time_sec,
 SUM(CASE WHEN b.is_champion=1 THEN b.roundtime_sec ELSE 0 END) AS champion_time_sec
 FROM base b
 GROUP BY b.week_idx, b.vplayerid, b.play_group
),
week_user_total AS (
 SELECT
 w.week_idx,
 w.vplayerid,
 SUM(w.group_time_sec) AS total_time_sec,
 SUM(w.champion_time_sec) AS champion_time_sec
 FROM week_user_group w
 GROUP BY w.week_idx, w.vplayerid
),
week_user_main AS (
 SELECT
 x.week_idx,
 x.vplayerid,
 x.group_time_sec AS main_time_sec
 FROM (
 SELECT
 wug.week_idx,
 wug.vplayerid,
 wug.group_time_sec,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
 PARTITION BY wug.week_idx, wug.vplayerid
 ORDER BY wug.group_time_sec DESC, wug.play_group
 ) AS rn
 FROM week_user_group wug
 ) x
 WHERE x.rn = 1
),
week_user_metrics AS (
 SELECT
 t.week_idx,
 t.vplayerid,
 t.total_time_sec,
 COALESCE(m.main_time_sec,0) AS main_time_sec,
 (t.total_time_sec - COALESCE(m.main_time_sec,0)) AS join_time_sec,
 t.champion_time_sec,
 CASE WHEN t.champion_time_sec > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS champion_flag
 FROM week_user_total t
 LEFT JOIN week_user_main m
 ON t.week_idx = m.week_idx
 AND t.vplayerid = m.vplayerid
),
convert_users AS (
 SELECT
 cur.week_idx AS cur_week_idx,
 cur.vplayerid
 FROM week_user_metrics cur
 LEFT JOIN week_user_metrics prev
 ON prev.week_idx = cur.week_idx - 1
 AND prev.vplayerid = cur.vplayerid
 WHERE cur.week_idx BETWEEN 1 AND 13
 AND cur.champion_flag = 1
 AND COALESCE(prev.champion_flag,0) = 0
),
agg AS (
 SELECT
 cu.cur_week_idx,
 SUM(COALESCE(prev.main_time_sec,0)) AS prev_main_time_sec,
 SUM(COALESCE(prev.join_time_sec,0)) AS prev_join_time_sec,
 SUM(COALESCE(cur.main_time_sec,0)) AS cur_main_time_sec,
 SUM(COALESCE(cur.join_time_sec,0)) AS cur_join_time_sec,
 SUM(COALESCE(cur.champion_time_sec,0)) AS cur_champion_time_sec
 FROM convert_users cu
 LEFT JOIN week_user_metrics prev
 ON prev.week_idx = cu.cur_week_idx - 1
 AND prev.vplayerid = cu.vplayerid
 LEFT JOIN week_user_metrics cur
 ON cur.week_idx = cu.cur_week_idx
 AND cur.vplayerid = cu.vplayerid
 GROUP BY cu.cur_week_idx
)
SELECT
 CONCAT(
 DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(str_to_date('20241002','%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL w.week_idx*7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'),
 '-',
 DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(str_to_date('20241002','%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL w.week_idx*7 + 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
 ) AS time_range,
 ROUND(COALESCE(a.prev_main_time_sec,0)/3600.0, 2) AS prev_week_main_play_time,
 ROUND(COALESCE(a.prev_join_time_sec,0)/3600.0, 2) AS prev_week_join_play_time,
 ROUND(COALESCE(a.cur_main_time_sec,0)/3600.0, 2) AS cur_week_main_play_time,
 ROUND(COALESCE(a.cur_join_time_sec,0)/3600.0, 2) AS cur_week_join_play_time,
 ROUND(COALESCE(a.cur_champion_time_sec,0)/3600.0, 2) AS cur_week_champion_play_time
FROM week_dim w
LEFT JOIN agg a
 ON a.cur_week_idx = w.week_idx
ORDER BY w.week_idx;

 '20230627' AS end_dt,
 str_to_date('20230322','%Y%m%d') AS start_date
),
season_end_users AS (

 r.vplayerid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
 WHEN r.modename='domain_term_372cbd9462'
 AND CAST(r.submode AS STRING) IN ('1265972235155284992','1278160113246405632')
 THEN r.dtstatdate END
 ) AS vertical_days_end,

 AND CAST(r.submode AS STRING) IN ('1265972235155284992','1278160113246405632')
 THEN CAST(COALESCE(r.roundcnt,'0') AS BIGINT) ELSE 0 END
 ) AS vertical_rounds_end,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
 WHEN NOT (r.modename='domain_term_372cbd9462'
 AND CAST(r.submode AS STRING) IN ('1265972235155284992','1278160113246405632'))
 THEN r.dtstatdate END
 ) AS non_vertical_days_end
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di r

 GROUP BY r.vplayerid
 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
 WHEN r.modename='domain_term_372cbd9462'

 ) >= 1
),
cohort AS (

 seu.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN seu.vertical_days_end BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'domain_term_c34638dd57'
 WHEN seu.vertical_days_end BETWEEN 5 AND 15 THEN 'domain_term_3b2e3b88bb'

 END AS vertical_level_end,
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(seu.non_vertical_days_end,0)=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_vertical_exclusive_end
 FROM season_end_users seu
),
weeks AS (
 SELECT
 x.week_idx,
 DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(p.start_date, INTERVAL x.week_idx*7 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AS week_start_dt,
 DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(p.start_date, INTERVAL x.week_idx*7+6 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AS week_end_dt
 FROM (
 SELECT FLOOR(DATEDIFF(str_to_date(l.dtstatdate,'%Y%m%d'), str_to_date('20230322','%Y%m%d'))/7) AS week_idx
 FROM dws_jordass_login_di l
 JOIN cohort c ON c.vplayerid = l.vplayerid
 WHERE l.dtstatdate BETWEEN '20230322' AND '20230627'
 AND l.platid = 255
 GROUP BY FLOOR(DATEDIFF(str_to_date(l.dtstatdate,'%Y%m%d'), str_to_date('20230322','%Y%m%d'))/7)

),

 AND l.platid = 255
 GROUP BY FLOOR(DATEDIFF(str_to_date(l.dtstatdate,'%Y%m%d'), p.start_date)/7), l.vplayerid
),
vertical_by_week_user AS (
 SELECT
 FLOOR(DATEDIFF(str_to_date(r.dtstatdate,'%Y%m%d'), p.start_date)/7) AS week_idx,
 r.vplayerid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT r.dtstatdate) AS vertical_days,
 SUM(CAST(COALESCE(r.roundcnt,'0') AS BIGINT)) AS vertical_rounds
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di r
 JOIN params p ON 1=1
 JOIN cohort c ON c.vplayerid = r.vplayerid
 WHERE r.dtstatdate BETWEEN p.start_dt AND p.end_dt
 AND r.modename='domain_term_372cbd9462'
 AND CAST(r.submode AS STRING) IN ('1265972235155284992','1278160113246405632')
 GROUP BY FLOOR(DATEDIFF(str_to_date(r.dtstatdate,'%Y%m%d'), p.start_date)/7), r.vplayerid
),
unioned AS (
 SELECT
 l.week_idx,
 l.vplayerid,
 'login_days_dist' AS metric_type,
 CASE
 WHEN l.login_days = 1 THEN '1'
 WHEN l.login_days BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3'
 WHEN l.login_days BETWEEN 4 AND 5 THEN '4-5'
 WHEN l.login_days BETWEEN 6 AND 7 THEN '6-7'
 ELSE '7+'
 END AS bucket
 FROM login_by_week_user l

 UNION ALL

 SELECT
 v.week_idx,
 v.vplayerid,
 'vertical_days_dist' AS metric_type,
 CASE
 WHEN v.vertical_days = 1 THEN '1'
 WHEN v.vertical_days BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3'
 WHEN v.vertical_days BETWEEN 4 AND 5 THEN '4-5'
 WHEN v.vertical_days BETWEEN 6 AND 7 THEN '6-7'
 ELSE '7+'
 END AS bucket
 FROM vertical_by_week_user v

 UNION ALL

 SELECT
 v.week_idx,
 v.vplayerid,
 'vertical_rounds_dist' AS metric_type,
 CASE
 WHEN v.vertical_rounds = 0 THEN '0'
 WHEN v.vertical_rounds = 1 THEN '1'
 WHEN v.vertical_rounds BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3'
 WHEN v.vertical_rounds BETWEEN 4 AND 5 THEN '4-5'
 WHEN v.vertical_rounds BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10'
 WHEN v.vertical_rounds BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20'
 ELSE '21+'
 END AS bucket
 FROM vertical_by_week_user v
),
agged AS (
 SELECT
 w.week_start_dt,
 w.week_end_dt,
 CONCAT(w.week_start_dt,'~',w.week_end_dt) AS period_7d,
 CONCAT(c.vertical_level_end, CASE WHEN c.is_vertical_exclusive_end=1 THEN '（domain_term_033f46605d）' ELSE '（domain_term_8cc3c0a214）' END) AS active_level,
 u.metric_type,
 u.bucket AS active_days,
 COUNT(DISTINCT u.vplayerid) AS users_cnt
 FROM unioned u
 JOIN weeks w ON w.week_idx = u.week_idx
 JOIN cohort c ON c.vplayerid = u.vplayerid
 GROUP BY
 w.week_start_dt,
 w.week_end_dt,
 CONCAT(w.week_start_dt,'~',w.week_end_dt),
 CONCAT(c.vertical_level_end, CASE WHEN c.is_vertical_exclusive_end=1 THEN '（domain_term_033f46605d）' ELSE '（domain_term_8cc3c0a214）' END),
 u.metric_type,
 u.bucket
)
SELECT
 period_7d,
 active_level,
 metric_type,
 active_days,
 users_cnt
FROM agged
ORDER BY
 week_start_dt,
 active_level,
 metric_type,
 active_days;

player_day_255 AS (

),
month_user_255 AS (
 -- domain_term_78637f27c4：domain_term_f10e124851 + domain_term_7f7077aec4（domain_term_5f16c973cf）

 yyyymm,
 vplayerid,

),
-- domain_term_f8f11ea284：domain_term_a4138e1f07platid=255，domain_term_2ff45b3419（domain_term_2fd25f707e）
all_pay_anyplat AS (

 d.vplayerid,
 d.dtstatdate

),
first_pay_all_anyplat AS (

),
prev_pay_anyplat AS (

),
classified AS (

 p.yyyymm,

)

ORDER BY c.yyyymm, c.type;
